description_long: This research institute is a large, modern building complex set within a spacious, landscaped lot. The main structure features a flat black roof, white and gray exterior walls, and several distinct wings, including a prominent front section and side annexes. The grounds include green lawns, a tennis court, a swimming pool, and multiple parking areas, with a driveway and street access lined by parked cars. The building has multiple entry points, large windows, and appears to be surrounded by fencing or boundary walls. Outdoor amenities such as water features and recreational facilities are visible, suggesting a well-equipped, multi-purpose campus. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on accessibility and open space.
description: A large, modern research institute complex with flat roofs, white and gray facades, landscaped grounds, and outdoor amenities including a tennis court and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, parking, and a landscaped area with water features and cars along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, swimming pool, and additional green space adjacent to the main building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back annexes, fenced boundaries, and a clear view of the tennis court and open lawns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more parking, utility areas, and the rear of the main building with additional green space.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is wide and accessible, featuring a flat overhang, large double doors likely made of glass or metal, and a paved approach with no visible steps, suggesting wheelchair accessibility. The entrance is framed by clean, modern lines and is integrated into the front facade without ornate decoration.
